outputs.description: The URL. URLEnrichment.MaxScore The max score of all the indicators found.
outputs.name: URLEnrichment.Value

outputs.description: URLEnrichment.MaxVerdict The max verdict of all the indicators found. URLEnrichment.Results
outputs.name: number

outputs.description: URLEnrichment.TIMScore The TIM score of the URL. URLEnrichment.Status
outputs.name: List of all indicators found for the URL.

outputs.description: URLEnrichment.ModifiedTime The time the indicator was last modified. Date
outputs.name: The status of the indicator: "Manual" if the score was changed manually, "Fresh" if modified within the last week, "Stale" if modified more than a week ago, and "None" if never modified.

outputs.description: The brand of the indicator. URLEnrichment.Results.Score The score of the indicator.
outputs.name: URLEnrichment.Results.Brand

outputs.description: URLEnrichment.Results.Verdict The verdict of the indicator. URLEnrichment.Results.DetectionEngines
outputs.name: number

outputs.description: URLEnrichment.Results.PositiveDetections The positive detections of the indicator. URLEnrichment.Results.Data
outputs.name: The detection engines of the indicator.

outputs.description: URLEnrichment.Results.AdditionalFields All fields extracted from the indicator other then the main keys ("Brand", "Score", "Verdict", "DetectionEngines", "PositiveDetections", "Data"). URLEnrichment.Results.AdditionalFields.Relationships.EntityA
outputs.name: The URL it self.

outputs.description: URLEnrichment.Results.AdditionalFields.Relationships.EntityB The destination of the relationship. URLEnrichment.Results.AdditionalFields.Relationships.Relationship
outputs.name: The source of the relationship.

outputs.description: URLEnrichment.Results.AdditionalFields.Relationships.EntityAType The type of the source of the relationship. URLEnrichment.Results.AdditionalFields.Relationships.EntityBType
outputs.name: The name of the relationship.

outputs.name: The type of the destination of the relationship.

outputs.description: URLEnrichment.Results.AdditionalFields.Malicious.Description A description of the malicious URL. URLEnrichment.Results.AdditionalFields.Tags
outputs.name: The vendor reporting the URL as malicious.

outputs.name: The malware family associated with the URL.

outputs.description: Bool URLEnrichment.Results.AdditionalFields.Campaign The campaign associated with the URL.
outputs.name: Whether or not the URL is internal or external.

outputs.description: URLEnrichment.Results.AdditionalFields.TrafficLightProtocol The Traffic Light Protocol (TLP) color that is suitable for the URL. URLEnrichment.Results.AdditionalFields.ThreatTypes.threatcategory
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: URLEnrichment.Results.AdditionalFields.ThreatTypes.threatcategoryconfidence Threat Category Confidence is the confidence level provided by the vendor for the threat type category For example a confidence of 90 for threat type category 'malware' means that the vendor rates that this is 90% confidence of being a malware. URLEnrichment.Results.AdditionalFields.ASN
outputs.name: The threat category associated to this indicator by the source vendor. For example, Phishing, Control, TOR, etc.

outputs.name: The autonomous system name for the URL, for example: 'AS8948'.
